[Fact]
public async Task SelectTargetFileAsync_WhenSingleValidFileExists_ShouldReturnSelectedFileAndNotNotify()
{
    // Arrange
    var notificationMock = new Mock<IDiaExceptionNotificationService>();
    var service = CreateService(notificationMock);

    DateTime today = TimeZoneInfo.ConvertTimeFromUtc(
        DateTime.UtcNow,
        TimeZoneInfo.FindSystemTimeZoneById("New Zealand Standard Time")).Date;

    string startDate = today.AddDays(-1).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");
    string endDate = today.AddDays(1).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");

    string expectedFile = $"folder/BDM_Westpac_ISA_Deaths_{startDate}_{endDate}.txt.pgp";

    string[] files =
    {
        "folder/not-a-dia-file.txt",
        expectedFile
    };

    // Act
    var result = await InvokeSelectTargetFileAsync(service, files);

    // Assert
    Assert.Equal(expectedFile, result.SelectedFile);
    Assert.False(result.FailureHandled);

    notificationMock.Verify(
        service => service.NotifyFailureAsync(
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<Exception>(),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Never);
}
